title: dianthus strictus var. velutinus
intro: Dianthus strictus var. velutinus is a variety of the Dianthus strictus plant, commonly known as the Chinese pink or Chinese carnation, which is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dianthus strictus var. velutinus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
